message:
feat(optim,conformance): implement L-BFGS optimizer and adversarial fuzz corpus

Three major additions:

1. L-BFGS optimizer (ft-optim, ~500 lines):
   - Two-loop recursion for inverse Hessian approximation with
     configurable history_size
   - Three line search modes: None, BacktrackingArmijo, StrongWolfe
   - Builder-pattern config: max_iter, max_eval, tolerance_grad,
     tolerance_change, history_size, line_search_fn
   - Both Optimizer trait (single step) and closure-based
     step_with_closure API for loss/gradient recomputation
   - Flat parameter/gradient marshaling to/from session
   - 4 unit tests: basic step, closure-based quadratic, history
     bounds, two-loop negative-gradient fallback

2. Adversarial fuzz corpus (ft-conformance):
   - Add proptest dev-dependency and fuzz feature flag
   - 4 proptest-based fuzz tests: unary abs, binary add, reduction
     sum reference match, and matmul shape/finiteness (all 500 cases)
   - Handwritten adversarial special-values test (NaN, Inf, -0.0)
   - Manifest validation test ensuring G4 packets FT-P2C-003/005/
     007/008 have valid fixtures and replay commands
   - Expand ADVERSARIAL_FUZZ_CORPUS_MANIFEST_V1.json with 4 new
     families covering all G4 packets

3. Bug fix + CI:
   - Fix clip_grad_norm_ norm_type validation: the old condition
     incorrectly rejected +inf as a valid norm type
   - Update phase2c_reliability_gates.yml to run fuzz corpus tests
     as part of Gate G4 with updated error metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,10 +116,11 @@ jobs:
           }
           gate_fail() {
             local status=$?
-            echo "::error title=Gate G4 failure::gate_id=G4 budget_ids='phase2c-coverage-floor-v1,phase2c-pass-ratio-v1,phase2c-global-failure-ceiling-v1,phase2c-flake-ceiling-v1,phase2c-reason-taxonomy-v1' failing_packet=phase2c failing_suite=e2e_forensics replay='env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl' artifact_refs='artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_gate_window_v1.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-003.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-005.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-007.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-008.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/crash_triage_full_v1.json,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/failure_forensics_index_v1.json,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/reliability_gate_report_v1.json' reason_code=g4_e2e_or_budget_violation remediation_hint='Review reliability_gate_report_v1.json, failing scenario_ids, and replay commands'"
+            echo "::error title=Gate G4 failure::gate_id=G4 budget_ids='phase2c-coverage-floor-v1,phase2c-pass-ratio-v1,phase2c-global-failure-ceiling-v1,phase2c-flake-ceiling-v1,phase2c-reason-taxonomy-v1' failing_packet=phase2c failing_suite=e2e_forensics replay='env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo test -p ft-conformance --features fuzz fuzz_corpus_ -- --nocapture && env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl' artifact_refs='artifacts/phase2c/ADVERSARIAL_FUZZ_CORPUS_MANIFEST_V1.json,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_gate_window_v1.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-003.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-005.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-007.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-008.jsonl,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/crash_triage_full_v1.json,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/failure_forensics_index_v1.json,artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/reliability_gate_report_v1.json' reason_code=g4_e2e_or_budget_or_fuzz_violation remediation_hint='Review fuzz corpus tests, reliability_gate_report_v1.json, failing scenario_ids, and replay commands'"
             exit "$status"
           }
           trap gate_fail ERR
+          run_or_offload env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo test -p ft-conformance --features fuzz fuzz_corpus_ -- --nocapture
           run_or_offload env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl
           run_or_offload env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --packet FT-P2C-003 --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-003.jsonl
           run_or_offload env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --packet FT-P2C-005 --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-005.jsonl
